dictionary.settingsDesc: Show definitions in the selected language when clicking English words in parallel view

features.title: Features
features.bookmarksDesc: Save verses and organize them with tags
features.bookmarksInstruction: Tap a verse to open the verse menu, then press the bookmark button to save it. Create tags to organize bookmarks by topic, and add optional notes to each bookmark. View all bookmarks from the bottom menu, filter by tag, and tap to jump to that verse.
features.highlightsInstruction: Tap a verse to open the verse menu, then choose from 5 colors (yellow, green, blue, red, purple) to highlight it. Highlighted verses are color-coded in the text. View all highlights from the bottom menu and filter by color. Highlights work independently alongside bookmarks and notes on the same verse.
features.notesInstruction: Tap a verse to open the verse menu, then press the note button to write a text note. Notes are organized by book in the bottom menu, and tapping a note navigates to that verse. Notes work independently from highlights and bookmarks.
features.deleteLabelConfirm: Delete this label? Bookmarks will be kept.
features.commentaryDesc: View chapter-by-chapter AI Bible commentary alongside the text
features.commentaryInstruction: Enable AI Commentary in reader settings to display commentary next to the current chapter. Panel position can be set to left, right, or bottom. On first use, commentary data is downloaded for your language. Each chapter includes background and context, text exposition, theological themes, cross-references, and application.
features.interlinearInstruction: Enable Interlinear in reader settings to display Greek word cards for each verse, showing the original word, transliteration, and English gloss. Tap a word to view detailed information including lexeme (root word), Strong's number, and morphology (part of speech, case, number, gender). Currently supports New Testament Greek only.
features.dictionaryDesc: Tap words in parallel translations to look up definitions
features.dictionaryInstruction: Enable Dictionary in reader settings and activate a parallel translation. Tap any word in the parallel translation text to see definitions by part of speech, pronunciation, and more. English words use offline and online dictionaries, with definitions auto-translated to your app language. Use the speaker button to hear pronunciation.
features.tabsDesc: Open multiple Bible passages in separate tabs
features.tabsInstruction: Use the + button in the tab bar to add new tabs. Each tab maintains its own translation, book, chapter, and scroll position independently. Long-press and drag to reorder tabs. Double-tap a tab to pin it to the front. Close a tab with the X button on the active tab.

interlinear.title: Interlinear
interlinear.otNotAvailable:
Old Testament Hebrew interlinear is coming soon.
Currently only New Testament Greek is available.
interlinear.noData:

It may need to be downloaded.
